title: Verifier tool-operator evidence
purpose: B2.4 defines verifier tool operator evidence for the agent-driven expert system. Cognition & routing — [S0](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md)–S4, conductor, workers, dual-stack.
scope: Owns `B2.4` only; siblings under `B2` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §4 — Branch B — Cognition & routing plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#4-branch-b-cognition-routing-plane).
behavior_steps: When a task card declares a Test command or Tool command, the conductor spawns Verifier or tool-operator shell workers to run the literal CLI block and capture output under `evidence/`.
verify-router.py dispatches pytest and records `last_verify` in state.json; non-pytest evidence follows `docs/operator/evidence-types.md` paths declared on the card.
Verifier and tool-operator workers do not edit product source except through declared tool output paths; they return bounded logs to the conductor for merge.
`last_verify=passed` is required before the conductor marks an evidence-required implement task complete or advances past implement-feature.
Verifier failure blocks task completion and may invoke [B3.3](B3.3-escalation-loop-on-verify-fail.md); workers cannot self-clear evidence gates without conductor re-run.

narrative: B2.4 defines verifier tool operator evidence for the agent-driven expert system. Cognition & routing — [S0](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md)–S4, conductor, workers, dual-stack. In practice, the system when a task card declares a test command or tool command, the conductor spawns verifier or tool-operator shell workers to run the literal cli block and capture output under `evidence/`, then verify-router.py dispatches pytest and records `last_verify` in state.json; non-pytest evidence follows `docs/operator/evidence-types.md` paths declared on the card.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-b 2026-06-28 -->

Verifier and tool-operator are shell-class workers for bounded CLI runs: pytest via verify-router, Blender/Unreal export commands, checksum tools—anything with a literal command block on the task card. They write evidence logs under `evidence/` and set `last_verify` in state.

Non-pytest evidence types follow `docs/operator/evidence-types.md`. Verifier failure blocks task completion and may trigger [B3.3](B3.3-escalation-loop-on-verify-fail.md) escalation without clearing gates. Tool-operator never edits product source except via declared tool output paths.
